item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-024","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant correctly separates the broad AI-transition trend from the high-stakes path decision of quitting now. It emphasizes optionality, staged validation, runway, customer/payment evidence, unique advantage, and explicit quit-trigger conditions. It does not infer 'AI trend therefore resign now'; it recommends shifting toward AI while preserving income and testing before committing."}
